name: wosiwosi-v2
description: Root deploy orchestrator: builds the frontend SPA and the backend API; the backend serves both from one Heroku dyno. The two projects remain fully independent — this file holds no app code and no dependencies.

scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm ci --prefix backend --include=dev && npm ci --prefix frontend --include=dev && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
